transcript: Speaker A: Aaa.. Yes sir, Aaa they are coming interview 10 days sir.. Speaker B: Ye kaunsi English bol raha hai bhai? [What kind of English are you speaking, brother?] Speaker A: Maine YouTube videos, online courses, yahan tak ki grammar books bhi try kar liye lekin meri English mein koi improvement hi nahi aa rahi hai yaar. [I've tried YouTube videos, online courses, even grammar books, but there's no improvement in my English, man.] Speaker B: Main sach bataun, tum ye sab time waste karna band karo aur meri tarah kuch effective use karo. Tum SpeakX app kyun nahi use karte? [To be honest, stop wasting time on all this and use something effective like me. Why don't you use the SpeakX app?] Speaker A: Ye SpeakX app kya hai? [What is this SpeakX app?] Speaker B: Is app mein tum AI teachers ki help se English bolna seekh sakte ho. Aur ye teachers bilkul bhi judge nahi karti. Isse tum interview related kuch bhi pooch sakte ho, jaise ki introduction kaise dete hain, apni hobbies, skills ya strengths kaise batani hain. Main bata rahi hoon, roz 10 se 15 minute is app par daily practice karna shuru kar do aur phir dekhna, 15 se 20 dinon mein ekdum fluent English bolne lag jaoge. [In this app, you can learn to speak English with the help of AI teachers. And these teachers don't judge at all. You can ask them anything related to interviews, like how to introduce yourself, how to talk about your hobbies, skills, or strengths. I'm telling you, start practicing 10 to 15 minutes daily on this app, and then see, in 15 to 20 days you'll start speaking fluent English.] Speaker A: Yaar Shreya, ye AI mehenga hoga na? [But Shreya, this AI must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: Aree tum tension mat lo, sirf ’4 per day mein 7 din ka trial le sakte ho. [Oh don't worry, you can get a 7-day trial for just ’4 per day.] Speaker A: Aree pehle batati na, ruko main abhi download karta hoon SpeakX app. [Why didn't you tell me earlier, wait, I'll download the SpeakX app right now.]

summary: A young man struggles with English during an interview call, prompting his friend to recommend the SpeakX app. She explains how its non-judgmental AI teachers help users practice interview preparation and daily speaking skills. The ad highlights a low-cost trial of ’4 per day, encouraging immediate app download.
